requirement_topic.en: Battery-Specific Regulation — Bahrain Has No EU-Style Battery Regulation; GSO Energy-Efficiency Labelling and General Product Safety Apply
requirement_topic.zh: 电池专项法规——巴林无欧盟式电池法规；适用GSO能效标签及一般产品安全
requirement_topic.zht: 電池專項法規——巴林無歐盟式電池法規；適用GSO能效標籤及一般產品安全

summary.en: Bahrain does not operate a single comprehensive battery regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542. There is no Bahraini battery passport, mandatory carbon-footprint declaration, recycled-content threshold, or critical-mineral supply-chain due-diligence law for portable lithium batteries or power banks. Instead, batteries placed on the Bahraini market fall under: (1) general product safety and conformity administered by the Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD) under the Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC), which adopts GSO (GCC Standardization Organization) standards; (2) GSO energy-efficiency and labelling requirements where the product or its host equipment is within a regulated scope; and (3) GCC technical regulations transposed into Bahraini practice. Producer-responsibility and recycling obligations are handled through general environmental and waste rules under the Supreme Council for Environment rather than a dedicated battery EPR scheme. Mains supply context: 230 V, 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 巴林没有等同于欧盟电池法规（EU）2023/1542的单一综合性电池法规。巴林对便携式锂电池或移动电源不设电池护照、强制碳足迹声明、再生材料含量门槛或关键矿产供应链尽职调查法律。投放巴林市场的电池主要受以下约束：（1）由工业商务部（MOIC）下属巴林标准计量局（BSMD）管理的一般产品安全与符合性，该局采纳GSO（海湾标准化组织）标准；（2）当产品或其主机设备处于受监管范围内时适用的GSO能效与标签要求；（3）转化为巴林实践的海湾技术法规。生产者责任与回收义务通过最高环境委员会的一般环境及废物规则处理，而非专门的电池EPR制度。市电背景：230伏、50赫兹。
summary.zht: 巴林沒有等同於歐盟電池法規（EU）2023/1542的單一綜合性電池法規。巴林對便攜式鋰電池或行動電源不設電池護照、強制碳足跡聲明、再生材料含量門檻或關鍵礦產供應鏈盡職調查法律。投放巴林市場的電池主要受以下約束：（1）由工業商務部（MOIC）下屬巴林標準計量局（BSMD）管理的一般產品安全與符合性，該局採納GSO（海灣標準化組織）標準；（2）當產品或其主機設備處於受監管範圍內時適用的GSO能效與標籤要求；（3）轉化為巴林實踐的海灣技術法規。生產者責任與回收義務透過最高環境委員會的一般環境及廢物規則處理，而非專門的電池EPR制度。市電背景：230伏、50赫茲。

standards_or_laws: Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD), Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC) — product conformity and standards adoption
GSO (GCC Standardization Organization) technical regulations and energy-efficiency labelling standards (adopted by Bahrain)
Supreme Council for Environment (Bahrain) — general environmental and waste management rules (no dedicated battery EPR scheme)

summary.en: China does not have a single battery regulation equivalent to the EU framework either. Portable lithium battery packs for export are primarily subject to GB 31241-2022 (safety), customs import/export declaration, and for certain rechargeable battery product categories, mandatory CCC certification under the CNCA catalogue. China operates a domestic producer-responsibility and recycling framework under the Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law and the 2021 Battery Recycling Management Measures, which applies inside China and differs structurally from any foreign scheme. There is no Chinese battery passport, carbon-footprint declaration, or critical-mineral due-diligence law imposed on exporters.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有等同于欧盟框架的单一电池法规。出口便携式锂电池组主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）、海关进出口申报约束，部分可充电电池产品类别还须依据CNCA目录取得强制性CCC认证。中国依据《固体废物污染环境防治法》及2021年《废旧电池回收管理办法》实行国内生产者责任与回收框架，适用于中国境内，在结构上与任何境外制度存在差异。中国未对出口商施加电池护照、碳足迹声明或关键矿产尽职调查法律。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有等同於歐盟框架的單一電池法規。出口便攜式鋰電池組主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）、海關進出口申報約束，部分可充電電池產品類別還須依據CNCA目錄取得強制性CCC認證。中國依據《固體廢物污染環境防治法》及2021年《廢舊電池回收管理辦法》實行國內生產者責任與回收框架，適用於中國境內，在結構上與任何境外制度存在差異。中國未對出口商施加電池護照、碳足跡聲明或關鍵礦產盡職調查法律。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
PRC Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law (2020 revision) — domestic producer-responsibility framework
MIIT/NDRC Battery Recycling Management Measures (2021) — domestic recycling obligations

gap.en: Unlike the EU, Bahrain imposes no battery passport, carbon-footprint declaration, recycled-content threshold, or critical-mineral due-diligence obligation on portable battery exporters, so this is a lighter regulatory layer than an EU export. The practical gap for a Chinese exporter is therefore not a new battery-specific regulation but ensuring the product meets BSMD/GSO conformity (see cell-safety and market-access rows) and any GSO energy-efficiency labelling that applies to the host device. Chinese GB 31241 and CCC are not recognised by BSMD and do not substitute for GSO-based conformity. Exporters should confirm with BSMD/MOIC whether their specific product is in a regulated/registration scope, since coverage is product-dependent.
gap.zh: 与欧盟不同，巴林对便携式电池出口商不施加电池护照、碳足迹声明、再生材料含量门槛或关键矿产尽职调查义务，因此相对欧盟出口属于较轻的监管层级。中国出口商的实际差距并非新增电池专项法规，而是确保产品满足BSMD/GSO符合性（见电芯安全与市场准入行），以及适用于主机设备的任何GSO能效标签。中国GB 31241与CCC不被BSMD认可，不能替代以GSO为基础的符合性。出口商应向BSMD/MOIC确认其具体产品是否处于受监管/注册范围内，因覆盖范围视产品而定。
gap.zht: 與歐盟不同，巴林對便攜式電池出口商不施加電池護照、碳足跡聲明、再生材料含量門檻或關鍵礦產盡職調查義務，因此相對歐盟出口屬於較輕的監管層級。中國出口商的實際差距並非新增電池專項法規，而是確保產品滿足BSMD/GSO符合性（見電芯安全與市場准入行），以及適用於主機設備的任何GSO能效標籤。中國GB 31241與CCC不被BSMD認可，不能替代以GSO為基礎的符合性。出口商應向BSMD/MOIC確認其具體產品是否處於受監管/註冊範圍內，因覆蓋範圍視產品而定。

mandatory_status.target: No dedicated battery regulation — BSMD/GSO general conformity and any applicable GSO energy-efficiency labelling apply where the product is in scope; there is no Bahraini battery passport, carbon-footprint, or critical-mineral due-diligence requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable in equivalent form — GB 31241 safety compliance and customs declaration are domestic export requirements; no battery passport, carbon-footprint, or critical-mineral due-diligence law applies to Chinese exporters under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain has no EU-style comprehensive battery regulation, so the heavy obligations seen in an EU export (battery passport, carbon footprint, supply-chain due diligence, per-country EPR) do not apply here. The compliance focus for a Chinese exporter shifts to BSMD/GSO product conformity, GSO IEC 62133 safety, EMC, TRA type approval for any wireless function, UN 38.3 transport, and an in-country importer. Exporters should confirm directly with BSMD/MOIC whether their specific product falls into a registration or regulated scope, and whether GSO energy-efficiency labelling applies to the host device. Chinese GB 31241 and CCC are not recognised and do not substitute for GSO-based conformity.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林没有欧盟式综合性电池法规，因此欧盟出口中常见的重义务（电池护照、碳足迹、供应链尽职调查、各国EPR）在此不适用。中国出口商的合规重点转向BSMD/GSO产品符合性、GSO IEC 62133安全、EMC、任何无线功能的TRA型号核准、UN 38.3运输及在地进口商。出口商应直接向BSMD/MOIC确认其具体产品是否落入注册或受监管范围，以及GSO能效标签是否适用于主机设备。中国GB 31241与CCC不被认可，不能替代以GSO为基础的符合性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林沒有歐盟式綜合性電池法規，因此歐盟出口中常見的重義務（電池護照、碳足跡、供應鏈盡職調查、各國EPR）在此不適用。中國出口商的合規重點轉向BSMD/GSO產品符合性、GSO IEC 62133安全、EMC、任何無線功能的TRA型號核准、UN 38.3運輸及在地進口商。出口商應直接向BSMD/MOIC確認其具體產品是否落入註冊或受監管範圍，以及GSO能效標籤是否適用於主機設備。中國GB 31241與CCC不被認可，不能替代以GSO為基礎的符合性。

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC) — Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate
